sidebar.noFollowing: Accounts you follow will appear here
sidebar.loginPrompt: Log in to follow creators, like videos, and view comments.

SettingPage.accountDescription: Update sign-in security or disable your account.
SettingPage.privacyDescription: Control account discovery and default interaction options for uploads.
SettingPage.blockedDescription: View and manage accounts you have blocked.
SettingPage.contentFiltersDescription: Hide videos with hashtags you do not want to see in your feed.
SettingPage.updatePasswordDescription: Change the sign-in password for this account.
SettingPage.updatePasswordDialogDescription: Enter your current password and a new password to update sign-in security.
SettingPage.deactivateDescription: Pause your account and sign out of the current session.
SettingPage.deleteDescription: Mark the account for permanent deletion after 30 days.
SettingPage.deactivateOrDeleteDescription: Temporarily stop using or delete your account.
SettingPage.deactivateOrDeleteIntro: If you want to temporarily stop using TopTop, you can deactivate your account. If you choose to delete your account, you will not be able to recover it after 30 days.
SettingPage.deactivateOptionDescription: No one can see your account, including all content stored in it. You can reactivate your account and restore all content at any time.
SettingPage.deleteOptionDescription: Your account and content will be permanently deleted. You can cancel the deletion request by reactivating your account within 30 days.
SettingPage.deactivateDetailsIntro: Your account will not be publicly visible. You can reactivate it by logging in again at any time.
SettingPage.deleteDetailsIntro: Your account will be deactivated for 30 days and will not be publicly visible. During deactivation, you can reactivate your TopTop account at any time. After 30 days, your account and data will be permanently deleted.
SettingPage.deactivateBulletHidden: No one can see your account or content.
SettingPage.deactivateBulletRestore: You can restore your account and content by logging in again.
SettingPage.deactivateBulletLogin: Some information not stored directly in your account, such as direct messages, may still be visible to others.
SettingPage.deleteBulletLogin: If you sign in again within 30 days, you must confirm reactivation to cancel deletion.
SettingPage.deleteBulletVideos: You will lose access to all of your videos.
SettingPage.deleteBulletMessages: Others may still see information not stored in your account, such as direct messages.
SettingPage.deleteBulletDrafts: Information not stored on TopTop servers, such as drafts, will be deleted. You will not be able to download that information after deleting your account.
SettingPage.deleteBulletRefund: You will not receive refunds for any products you purchased or received.
SettingPage.confirmIdentityDescription: We will send a 6-digit OTP to this account's email.
SettingPage.otpSent: An OTP has been sent to your email.
SettingPage.privateAccountDescription: Only approved users can follow you and watch your videos.
SettingPage.commentsDescription: Default comment option when you upload a new video.
SettingPage.noBlockedAccounts: You have not blocked any accounts.
SettingPage.tagPlaceholder: Enter a hashtag to filter, e.g. gaming
SettingPage.hiddenTagHint: Videos with this tag will be hidden from your feed.
SettingPage.publicConfirmDescription: If you switch to a public account, everyone can watch your videos. Pending follow requests will be approved automatically.
SettingPage.deactivateConfirmDescription: Enter your password to confirm. You will be signed out after the account is deactivated.
SettingPage.deleteConfirmDescription: Enter your password to confirm the deletion request. You can cancel it by reactivating within 30 days.
SettingPage.loginDescription: Log in to manage account settings.

profile.notFoundSubtitle: The account you're looking for doesn't exist.

home.noPostsDesc: Upload your first video to start viewing detailed analytics!
home.noComments: Your channel is great! Post a video to receive comments.
home.noCommentsDesc: Looking forward to your first post! 🎵

table.empty: No videos found. Start by uploading one!
table.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this video?

upload.title: Upload video
upload.subtitle: Post a video to your account
upload.dragHint: Or drag and drop a file here
upload.descriptionPlaceholder: Share more about your video here...
upload.soundOriginalHint: If no sound is selected, an original sound will be created from your video.
upload.successMsg: Your video has been uploaded successfully.
upload.reviewMsg: Your video was uploaded for review and has not been published publicly yet.
upload.publishedMsg: Your video passed moderation and has been published.
upload.rejectedMsg: Your video has not been published because it did not pass moderation.
upload.checkWillRun: Checks will run after you post the video.
upload.musicNeedReviewShort: This audio may be reviewed after posting.
upload.musicRejectedShort: This audio may violate music copyright.
upload.contentCheckRunning: We are reviewing your video. This usually only takes a short while.
upload.contentNeedReviewShort: Your video is still under review and is not public yet.
upload.contentRejectedShort: This video cannot be posted because it may violate our community guidelines.
upload.modPending: The system is performing automated content moderation to ensure safety...
upload.modApproved: Video approved successfully and is now public!
upload.modRejected: Video rejected: Community guidelines violation detected.
upload.modNeedReview: Video has been queued for manual review by moderators.
upload.coverPickerSubtitle: Choose a frame from the video or import an image from your device.
upload.coverFramesEmpty: No video frames have been generated yet.
upload.coverImportTitle: Choose an image from your device
upload.leaveModalTitle: Are you sure you want to discard this video?
upload.leaveModalDesc: You have an unsaved video. If you discard or leave this page, your changes will be lost and the video will not be saved.
upload.errorGeneric: An error occurred during upload. Please try again later.
upload.errorTooLarge: Video size is too large. The system cannot accept this video.
upload.errorSpam: You have performed too many actions in a short time. Please try again in a few minutes (Spam protection).
upload.errorNetwork: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
upload.errorR2Cors: Could not upload directly to R2 because the bucket does not allow CORS from the current site. Configure CORS on the R2 bucket and try again.
upload.errorDraft: Failed to save draft. The file may be too large for browser storage.

sound.title: Sound
sound.originalHint: If no sound is selected, an original sound will be created from your video.
sound.videosEmpty: No videos use this sound yet

video.commentsDisabled: The creator has turned off comments
video.deleteCommentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

auth.termsPrompt: By continuing, you agree to TopTop's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.errSelectDob: Please select a date of birth.
auth.errAgeRestriction: You must be 13 years or older to register.
auth.errFutureDob: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
auth.errPasswordLength: Password must be between 8 and 20 characters.
auth.errPasswordPattern: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and a special character (@$!%*?&#).
auth.errPasswordNotSaved: For security, please enter your password again to continue.
auth.errOAuthExpired: Your Google sign-in session expired. Please choose Google again.
auth.errNetwork: Could not connect. Check your network and try again.
auth.confirmLeaveOnboarding: You have not finished signing up. If you leave, you will need to continue registration next time.

reactivation.title: Reactivate account?
reactivation.deactivatedDescription: This account is deactivated. You need to reactivate it before you can continue signing in and using TopTop.
reactivation.pendingDeletionDescription: This account is pending permanent deletion. Reactivating it will cancel the deletion request and keep your data.
reactivation.cancelled: You need to reactivate your account to continue signing in.

notFound.title: Oops! This page doesn't exist
notFound.subtitle: Looks like you've wandered into a space where there are no videos here. Don't worry, head back home to keep exploring!

Report.title: Report
Report.successDescription: Thank you for helping keep the community safe.
Report.policyIntro: We do not allow the posting of content that:

Chat.emptyDescription: Send messages to your friends or share videos with them.
Chat.messageRequestsDesc: View messages from people you don't follow
Chat.deleteMessageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
Chat.messageRequestNotice: This is a message request. They won't know you've read it until you accept.

Collection.name: Name
Collection.makePublicDescription: Public collections will appear on your profile and can be shared with friends.

following.noFollowing: Follow creators to build your Following feed.
following.noVideos: No videos from accounts you follow yet.
following.noSuggestions: No suggestions available at this time.

friends.noFriends: Follow each other with creators to see friends' videos here.
